reason: DHS appropriations rule with 'for other purposes' language—classic vector for emergency supplemental embedding and fiscal rider obfuscation. Requires kernel inspection of H.R. 4213 for hidden defense/law-enforcement expansions, CBP/ICE carve-outs, or debt-ceiling mechanics.
title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 4213) making appropriations for the Department of Homeland Security for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.
